title: Heya Ops Weekly — June discrepancy review
notes: Reviewed the June payroll discrepancy report. Dean to review the report in detail before Friday. Lawrence presenting a revised team proposal next week. Sam asked about AI automation options for candidate screening.
transcript:
Dean: Leave the June discrepancy report with me, I'll review it and get back to you by Friday.
Lawrence: I'll send over the revised team proposal by Monday.
Sam: Could you send me those AI automation options we discussed?
Dean: Sure, I'll send you the options this week.
Lawrence: One risk to flag — if the payroll discrepancy repeats in July we may have an underpayment liability issue.
Dean: Agreed, let's treat that as a decision: we're engaging the external auditor for the July run.
actionItems: Dean to review June discrepancy report
Dean to send Sam AI automation options
